```{=html}
<div style="width:78%;margin:0 auto;text-align:center;">

 <div style="position:relative;border:1.5px solid rgba(255,184,77,0.5);border-radius:18px;padding:1.5em 1.6em 1.4em;background:linear-gradient(160deg,rgba(255,184,77,0.08),rgba(86,84,162,0.06));">

  <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#FFB84D;letter-spacing:0.18em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.5em;">— part 03 —</div>

  <div style="font-size:1.4em;font-weight:700;color:#F8F7F0;line-height:1.1;margin-bottom:0.95em;letter-spacing:-0.01em;">
   Data Safety<br><span style="color:#FFB84D;">with AI</span>
  </div>

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.5em;">
   <div style="background:rgba(248,247,240,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,184,77,0.25);border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.5em;text-align:left;">
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.4em;color:#FFB84D;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.2em;">ch 01</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#F8F7F0;line-height:1.4;">Counter-productivity of AI</div>
   </div>
   <div style="background:rgba(248,247,240,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,184,77,0.25);border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.5em;text-align:left;">
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.4em;color:#FFB84D;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.2em;">ch 02</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#F8F7F0;line-height:1.4;">The data-science dilemma</div>
   </div>
   <div style="background:rgba(248,247,240,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,184,77,0.25);border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.5em;text-align:left;">
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.4em;color:#FFB84D;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.2em;">ch 03</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#F8F7F0;line-height:1.4;">A successful workflow</div>
   </div>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
